# anthropic_spend_limit_increase_requests (Data Source)

Lists spend limit increase requests, most recent first.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "anthropic_spend_limit_increase_requests" "pending" {
  status = ["pending"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `actor_ids` (List of String) Filter by requester user IDs.
- `status` (List of String)

### Read-Only

- `requests` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--requests))

<a id="nestedatt--requests"></a>
### Nested Schema for `requests`

Read-Only:

- `actor_email` (String)
- `actor_name` (String)
- `actor_user_id` (String)
- `amount` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `currency` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `period` (String)
- `resolved_at` (String)
- `resolved_by` (String)
- `status` (String)
